selection.chart1_parity_gate: respected: no final-pass eligibility for class-reference-only/manual rows or rows without exact crop final-pass clearance

blockers: All 50 batch014 rows fail first-pass visual parity: Helm candidates render as generic circles while references require exact topmark silhouettes such as slanted board/diamond, round-board-with-center-mark, cross, oblique staff/slash, or triangle.
Rows with vertical/horizontal/diagonal/S-57 pattern-6, checkered, or multi-colour semantics do not encode the required internal pattern or colour order.
TOPSHPP2 and TOPSHPR1 only have broad class-panel Chart No.1 witness crops in this pass; they are not final-pass eligible under chart1_parity_gate.
No row in this slice is human-final approved; all 50 need repair before final approval can be considered.

verdicts.expected: TOPSHP81;TE('%s' must preserve the slanted square-board/diamond-board topmark silhouette and required colour semantics: orange, black using vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail for first-pass visual parity. Candidate preserves only a generic circular placeholder, while the row metadata and visual witnesses require a specific topmark silhouette/orientation and any listed colour-order semantics. No final human approval claimed.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a plain orange circle with a black outline. The Chart No.1/OpenCPN witnesses require a slanted square-board/diamond-board topmark silhouette with orientation and internal colour/order semantics where listed.
verdicts.required_change: Replace the circular placeholder with the slanted square-board/diamond-board topmark silhouette and encode the required colour order/pattern: orange, black using vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order.
